title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech discusses how AI coding agents can increase technical debt if not paired with rigorous human-in-the-loop verification and testing. The video argues that maintaining engineering craft and code review processes is essential to ensure AI-accelerated development reduces maintenance costs rather than just increasing output.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech examines how AI coding agents can accumulate technical debt when their output is not paired with rigorous human-in-the-loop verification and testing. The argument: AI-accelerated development only reduces maintenance costs if engineering craft and code review processes stay intact, rather than simply increasing the volume of code produced. The takeaway is that human review, testing, and verification remain essential controls on agent-generated software.
